title: podocarpus costalis subsp. muroii
intro: Podocarpus costalis subsp. muroii, also known as Muro's yellow podocarp, is a species of coniferous tree within the Podocarpus genus, native to Japan. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which can be used to treat various health issues. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and bark are often used to make teas or infusions, which are believed to aid in the treatment of various ailments, including fever and digestive issues.
